comments.content: This pattern scaled better than I expected once the view tree got deeper.

content: Building a Feed with SwiftUI #1 explores a practical SwiftUI technique. SwiftUI works best when views stay small, focused, and driven by clear state. This post walks through a practical pattern you can reuse in production screens. You can adapt the same approach for posts, dashboards, forms, and detail screens.
